content.en:
In this way, Ye Tian's replica body has been staying here to comprehend and not going anywhere.

As countless long years passed, Ye Tian realized many mysteries from this drop of blood, comprehended the Extreme Dao Life Pattern more deeply, and was even gradually expected to create a third Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane involving the ultimate rules of the Time Pole.

this day.

Ye Tian created the third Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and the moment it was cast, the endless space-time lines around it were solidified.

This Extreme Ultimate Arcane can freeze everything, even enemy attacks, but it can't move itself.

But once the enemy's attack is solidified, it is equivalent to losing kinetic energy, and no matter how powerful the attack is, it will dissipate.

It can be said that the function of this extreme ultimate arcane is to counteract the enemy's attacks and kills, creating opportunities for oneself and even the hope of escaping "Five-Two-Seven".

"This Extreme Ultimate Arcane is called the Solid of Time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After creating the Solidity of Time, his ability to save his life skyrocketed.

And after another period of time, he finally comprehended a wisp of the ultimate rule of the Time Pole Dao, and tried to integrate the ultimate rule of the Time Pole Dao into the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws.

He already had the experience of fusion, and this time it was naturally not too difficult to fuse the ultimate rules of the Time Pole Dao.

It only took too many years, and this wisp of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule of Time was successfully integrated into the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule.

With this integration, the power of the Ultimate Rule of Ten Thousand Laws skyrocketed, and it also caused the power of the Ultimate Rule of Ten Thousand Laws realm to become extremely terrifying.

After all, the realm of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws is also an application of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, and when the foundation is strong, the realm of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws will naturally transform.

Now, even the most powerful peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse is difficult to tear apart his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm.

Moreover, his space-time form secret method can also condense one after another space-time ultimate rule realms, and now that he has comprehended a wisp of time extreme ultimate rules, it will also cause the power of these space-time ultimate rule realms to skyrocket and transform.

In short, Ye Tian's current strength is equivalent to skyrocketing.

However, he is still here to comprehend, and he is ready to use this drop of blood to completely perfect his life pattern to the extreme life pattern.

In this way, Ye Tian spent a long time here.

During this period, a lot of things also happened on the side of the main department of the mother of Aluo, such as the war between the major tribes, etc., but Ye Tian did not interfere.

And in the countless years of the Eagle Ministry, many emperors have also been born, and even many tribes have taken the initiative to join the Eagle Ministry.

At this time, the Eagle Department had a vague tendency to replace the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and for a while, many emperors of the Dragon Disciple tribe suggested suppressing the Eagle Tribe.

But the ancient demon-level powerhouses of the Dragon Disciple Tribe knew Ye Tian's horror, where did they dare to suppress it, but instead suppressed the emperor-level who dared to make this suggestion.

......

It's been a long time.

Now.

Ye Tian was at a very critical moment, his body was transforming, many resources were taken out by him and swallowed directly, and even this drop of blood was swallowed by Ye Tian.

Then, the energy contained in this drop of blood was too terrifying, and it was difficult for ordinary peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses to withstand its violent energy.

However, Ye Tian withstood it, but his body cracked and healed again and again.

In the end, Ye Tian's body was filled with wisps of aura like the ultimate ancient demon, but this was not the ultimate ancient demon realm, he was still a top ancient demon level realm.

It's just that he successfully condensed the Extreme Life Pattern.

Now, his cultivation is just inferior to the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and in other aspects, he is like the real Ultimate Ancient Demon!

His body can also be called the weakened ultimate ancient demon body!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian stood up, and the terrifying power on his body seemed to be able to shatter an area of the endless space-time line with his hands.

The power of the endless space-time line invaded his body, and it didn't cause any effect at all, like a breeze blowing through his body.

Now, with his current physical body, cultivation, and extreme ultimate arcane arts, and many form secret methods, he is completely sure that he will be able to fight with the top peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and he may not be able to fight, but he will definitely not be too weak.

And the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses like the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon and Proz, he can be destroyed with a snap of his fingers!

"Hahaha, this harvest is too big!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he changed all the other replica bodies to the current strength.

And that drop of blood was gone, and there was no way to continue his enlightenment, so he left here and continued to explore the endless time and space line.....

......

Another period of time has passed.

With many resources, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the true limit of a top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and he was only one step away from the peak Ancient Demon-level realm.

Stepping into this step, he is a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and he can even be called invincible in the peak ancient demon-level realm!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian crushed the bottleneck with the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm of the Consummation Realm, transformed his physical body, made a breakthrough in cultivation, and stepped into the peak Ancient Demon Level Realm!

Spallation!

Spallation!

Or metamorphosis!

This time the metamorphosis, the physical body has been improved too much!

He himself has reached the Extreme Life Pattern, because every breakthrough he makes will bring about a huge breakthrough, which is comparable to ordinary breakthroughs.

And this breakthrough absorbed too much energy, not to mention the exhaustion of countless resources accumulated over several months, and almost exhausted many of the ultimate particle energy in this territory.

However, Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough, and the peak ancient demon-level realm gradually stabilized.

After the breakthrough, he continued to practice and stabilize his realm.

Soon after.

Ye Tian came out of the customs and revealed the peak ancient demon level realm.

And the news spread quickly.

When the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon heard the news, his face was extremely gloomy and very frightened.

He knew very well that Ye Tian definitely had the strength to kill him now.

However, Ye Tian shouldn't dare to make a move.

"This son's strength has improved too quickly, fortunately, he is not the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the main department of Ah Luo's mother, otherwise I really may not be able to survive!"

Golden Destroying Ancient Demon Dao.

Of course, he didn't dare to leave the Abyss of Aromu in the future, otherwise Ye Tian might really kill him.

Tribe of Dragons.

Proz knew that Ye Tian had broken through, but he was not the slightest surprised, after all, Ye Tian had already comprehended the ultimate rule realm of the Consummation Realm, and he would naturally be able to break through when he had reached the limit of the top Ancient Demon level realm when he cultivated to the limit.

Therefore, it is undoubtedly normal for Ye Tian to step into the peak ancient demon level realm now, but this speed is a little fast.
